reasoning: The control focuses on maintaining confidentiality of information. In Kubernetes, this can be addressed by ensuring that secrets are encrypted at rest, both in etcd and in Kubernetes Secrets. Additionally, secrets should not be exposed in environment variables. Enabling audit logging helps track access and changes to confidential information, ensuring that any unauthorized access attempts are logged and can be reviewed.
title: C1.1 The entity identifies and maintains confidential information to meet the entity’s objectives related to confidentiality
